subcodes.first_line: O thou who art gladdened by the glad-tidings of God and assured of the grace and bounty of the Sovereign of Oneness! Thy mention was made in the Most Great Prison in the gathering [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مستبشر ببشارات الله و مطمئن بفضل و موهبت سلطان احدیت ذکرت در سجن اعظم در انجمن
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual communication; connections of the heart, @music and singing, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
